mapper.insert:
insert into t_question_import_batch
id, file_id, user_id, status, chunk_size, expected_chunk_count, received_chunk_count, total_row_count, imported_count, error_message, created_time, updated_time,
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{fileId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{chunkSize,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{expectedChunkCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{receivedChunkCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{totalRowCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{importedCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{errorMessage,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatedTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.select: select id, file_id, user_id, status, chunk_size, expected_chunk_count, received_chunk_count, total_row_count, imported_count, error_message, created_time, updated_time from t_question_import_batch where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
